# Available OCR Models & Quality Assignments

*This file is auto-generated by `ocr_scan.py --refresh-models`.*

> Run `python ocr_scan.py --refresh-models` to populate this document
> with live model availability and quality tier assignments.

## Quality Tiers

| Quality | Synonym | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| `low` | `fast` | Best free, vision-capable model across available backends |
| `normal` | `default` | Best standard-cost (not premium) model available |
| `high` | `slow` | Best possible model regardless of cost |

The actual backend/model assignments depend on which backends are configured
and what models are currently available. Run `--refresh-models` to detect
and assign them.
